properties.name: ejmask.autoconfig
properties.description: Enables or disables the entire EJMask Spring Boot auto-configuration. Omit or set to 'enabled' to activate; set to 'disabled' to suppress all EJMask wiring.

properties.name: ejmask.processor.content-slicer
properties.description: Enables the ContentSlicerProcessor, which truncates oversized payloads before masking to improve regex performance. Must be explicitly set to 'enabled'; absent by default.

properties.name: ejmask.processor.content-slicer.priority
properties.description: Execution order of the ContentSlicerProcessor relative to other content processors. Lower values run first. Only effective when ejmask.processor.content-slicer=enabled.

properties.name: ejmask.processor.content-slicer.max-size
properties.description: Maximum content length in characters before the ContentSlicerProcessor truncates the payload. Only effective when ejmask.processor.content-slicer=enabled.

properties.name: ejmask.processor.content-slicer.new-size
properties.description: Target content length in characters after truncation by the ContentSlicerProcessor. Must be less than ejmask.processor.content-slicer.max-size. Only effective when ejmask.processor.content-slicer=enabled.

values.description: EJMask auto-configuration is suppressed entirely; no beans are registered.
ContentSlicerProcessor bean is created and registered as a content pre-processor.
